objectives.name: Detection objective

objectives.name: Excitation objective

light_sources.notes: Housed in custom laser combiner. Water cooled.

fluorescence_filters.name: Emission filter
fluorescence_filters.notes: Custom made filter. No filter wheel.

motorized_stages.name: Illumination objective stage 1
motorized_stages.notes: translates illumination objective along detection axis. tiger M axis.

motorized_stages.name: Illumination objective stage 2
motorized_stages.notes: translates illumination objective perpendicular to detection axis. tiger N axis.
